item.title: Site build CI workflow
item.intent: Every push and PR must run npm run build and report status — catching type errors, broken imports, and schema violations before they reach main.
item.description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on push to main and on PRs. Install deps, run build, report status. Cache node_modules for speed.
steps: Create .github/workflows/build.yml triggered on push to main and pull_request
Use actions/setup-node with Node 20, enable npm caching
Run npm ci && npm run build

acceptanceCriteria.text: Build workflow exists and runs npm run build
Workflow triggers on push and PRs
